title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at IndiGo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at IndiGo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IndiGo is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IndiGo:
IndiGo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo!
